items.extraction_note: Safer but narrower vision; commander depends more on radio and internal reports.
Better outside awareness but increased exposure and vulnerability.
Very narrow, weapon-focused view that can miss flank danger.

source: The Battle of Carentan (8-15 June): Utah Beach to Cherbourg
items.extraction_note: Hedgerows hide enemy positions and block artillery observation.
Smoke, dust, and current distort landings and visual reference on the beach.
